packages.name: cobs
packages.description:
This is an implementation of the Consistent Overhead Byte Stuffing (COBS) algorithm.
    COBS is an algorithm for transforming a message into an encoding where a specific value
    (the "sentinel" value) is not used. This value can then be used to mark frame boundaries
    in a serial communication channel.

packages.name: ipnet
packages.description: Provides types and useful methods for working with IPv4 and IPv6 network addresses, commonly called IP prefixes. The new `IpNet`, `Ipv4Net`, and `Ipv6Net` types build on the existing `IpAddr`, `Ipv4Addr`, and `Ipv6Addr` types already provided in Rust's standard library and align to their design to stay consistent. The module also provides useful traits that extend `Ipv4Addr` and `Ipv6Addr` with methods for `Add`, `Sub`, `BitAnd`, and `BitOr` operations. The module only uses stable feature so it is guaranteed to compile using the stable toolchain.

packages.name: rustls
packages.description: Rustls is a modern TLS library written in Rust.

packages.name: rustls-pki-types
packages.description: Shared types for the rustls PKI ecosystem

packages.name: rustls-webpki
packages.description: Web PKI X.509 Certificate Verification.

packages.name: rustversion
packages.description: Conditional compilation according to rustc compiler version

packages.name: rusty-fork
packages.description:
Cross-platform library for running Rust tests in sub-processes using a
fork-like interface.

packages.name: ryu
packages.description: Fast floating point to string conversion

packages.name: rzup
packages.description: The RISC Zero version management library and CLI

packages.name: schemars
packages.description: Generate JSON Schemas from Rust code

packages.name: schemars
packages.description: Generate JSON Schemas from Rust code

packages.name: semver
packages.description: Parser and evaluator for Cargo's flavor of Semantic Versioning

packages.name: serde
packages.description: A generic serialization/deserialization framework

packages.name: serde_core
packages.description: Serde traits only, with no support for derive -- use the `serde` crate instead

packages.name: serde_derive
packages.description: Macros 1.1 implementation of #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]

packages.name: serde_json
packages.description: A JSON serialization file format

packages.name: serde_spanned
packages.description: Serde-compatible spanned Value

packages.name: serde_urlencoded
packages.description: `x-www-form-urlencoded` meets Serde

packages.name: serde_with
packages.description: Custom de/serialization functions for Rust's serde

packages.name: serde_with_macros
packages.description: proc-macro library for serde_with

packages.name: sha2
packages.description:
Pure Rust implementation of the SHA-2 hash function family
including SHA-224, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512.

packages.name: shlex
packages.description: Split a string into shell words, like Python's shlex.

packages.name: signature
packages.description: Traits for cryptographic signature algorithms (e.g. ECDSA, Ed25519)

packages.name: slab
packages.description: Pre-allocated storage for a uniform data type

packages.name: smallvec
packages.description: 'Small vector' optimization: store up to a small number of items on the stack

packages.name: socket2
packages.description:
Utilities for handling networking sockets with a maximal amount of configuration
possible intended.

packages.name: socket2
packages.description:
Utilities for handling networking sockets with a maximal amount of configuration
possible intended.

packages.name: spin
packages.description: Spin-based synchronization primitives

packages.name: spki
packages.description:
X.509 Subject Public Key Info (RFC5280) describing public keys as well as their
associated AlgorithmIdentifiers (i.e. OIDs)

packages.name: stability
packages.description: Rust API stability attributes for the rest of us.

packages.name: stable_deref_trait
packages.description: An unsafe marker trait for types like Box and Rc that dereference to a stable address even when moved, and hence can be used with libraries such as owning_ref and rental.

packages.name: strsim
packages.description:
Implementations of string similarity metrics. Includes Hamming, Levenshtein,
OSA, Damerau-Levenshtein, Jaro, Jaro-Winkler, and Sørensen-Dice.

packages.name: strum
packages.description: Helpful macros for working with enums and strings

packages.name: strum_macros
packages.description: Helpful macros for working with enums and strings

packages.name: subtle
packages.description: Pure-Rust traits and utilities for constant-time cryptographic implementations.

packages.name: syn
packages.description: Parser for Rust source code

packages.name: syn
packages.description: Parser for Rust source code

packages.name: sync_wrapper
packages.description: A tool for enlisting the compiler's help in proving the absence of concurrency

packages.name: synstructure
packages.description: Helper methods and macros for custom derives

packages.name: tempfile
packages.description: A library for managing temporary files and directories.

packages.name: thiserror
packages.description: derive(Error)

packages.name: thiserror-impl
packages.description: Implementation detail of the `thiserror` crate

packages.name: time
packages.description: Date and time library. Fully interoperable with the standard library. Mostly compatible with #![no_std].

packages.name: time-core
packages.description: This crate is an implementation detail and should not be relied upon directly.

packages.name: time-macros
packages.description:
Procedural macros for the time crate.
    This crate is an implementation detail and should not be relied upon directly.

packages.name: tinystr
packages.description: A small ASCII-only bounded length string representation.

packages.name: tinyvec
packages.description: `tinyvec` provides 100% safe vec-like data structures.

packages.name: tinyvec_macros
packages.description: Some macros for tiny containers

packages.description:
An event-driven, non-blocking I/O platform for writing asynchronous I/O
backed applications.

packages.name: tokio-rustls
packages.description: Asynchronous TLS/SSL streams for Tokio using Rustls.

packages.name: tokio-util
packages.description: Additional utilities for working with Tokio.

packages.name: toml
packages.description:
A native Rust encoder and decoder of TOML-formatted files and streams. Provides
implementations of the standard Serialize/Deserialize traits for TOML data to
facilitate deserializing and serializing Rust structures.

packages.name: toml_datetime
packages.description: A TOML-compatible datetime type

packages.name: toml_edit
packages.description: Yet another format-preserving TOML parser.

packages.name: toml_write
packages.description: A low-level interface for writing out TOML

packages.name: tower
packages.description:
Tower is a library of modular and reusable components for building robust
clients and servers.

packages.name: tower-http
packages.description: Tower middleware and utilities for HTTP clients and servers

packages.name: tower-layer
packages.description: Decorates a `Service` to allow easy composition between `Service`s.

packages.name: tower-service
packages.description: Trait representing an asynchronous, request / response based, client or server.

packages.name: tracing
packages.description: Application-level tracing for Rust.

packages.name: tracing-attributes
packages.description: Procedural macro attributes for automatically instrumenting functions.

packages.name: tracing-core
packages.description: Core primitives for application-level tracing.

packages.name: tracing-subscriber
packages.description: Utilities for implementing and composing `tracing` subscribers.

packages.name: try-lock
packages.description: A lightweight atomic lock.

packages.name: typenum
packages.description:
Typenum is a Rust library for type-level numbers evaluated at
    compile time. It currently supports bits, unsigned integers, and signed
    integers. It also provides a type-level array of type-level numbers, but its
    implementation is incomplete.

packages.name: unarray
packages.description: Utilities for working with uninitialized arrays

packages.name: utf8_iter

packages.name: valuable

packages.name: version_check
packages.description: Tiny crate to check the version of the installed/running rustc.

packages.name: wait-timeout

packages.name: want
